documents.text: openai docs skill guides agents to use official openai api and codex documentation as primary evidence. official_api_guidance answer openai api questions choose codex workflows cite official docs non-openai platform questions tasks requiring private account data coding research documentation openai codex

test driven development skill a workflow skill for writing a failing test before implementing features or bug fixes. testing_workflow add test coverage implement bug fixes guide coding agents through red-green-refactor throwaway prototypes without verification pure documentation edits testing coding workflow codex claude-code

gmail triage skill guides an agent to summarize gmail threads and extract action items with explicit authorization. email_task_summary summarize gmail tasks triage inbox draft email follow-ups accessing mail without user approval processing highly sensitive mail without scope limits communication email workflow codex

codex a coding agent that can inspect a workspace, edit files, run tests, and explain changes. coding_agent modify code run test suites prepare implementation plans review diffs executing unapproved destructive commands handling secrets without explicit approval coding testing agent workflow codex
